\tzpentry{ID4465}{Quantum Magnetization Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4465 introduces Quantum Magnetization Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\hat{M}_i = \int_{\Omega_i} \rho_{\text{vac}} \cdot \mathcal{R}_i(t) \cdot \text{det}(J_p) \, dV \equiv \frac{\hbar \omega_i}{c^2} \cdot \sqrt{\frac{\chi_T}{\Gamma_{\text{sync}}}}$$
